name: Free-Plus-Shipping / Book Post-Purchase + OTO Recovery Follow-Up
summary: Post-purchase follow-up for a Free-Plus-Shipping / Book funnel (or 2-step tripwire). Confirms the order and delivers the bonus/digital copy, BONDS the new buyer to the Attractive Character (Soap Opera), recovers the 'no-upsell' drop-off (buyers who skipped the OTO) with a second-chance OTO, and bridges the new buyer UP the value ladder to the next funnel (webinar / high-ticket). Front end breaks even; this sequence is where ascension profit lives.

exit_conditions: Buyer ascends (buys the next-step offer) -> route to that funnel's follow-up
segmentation_inputs: Took the OTO vs declined (no-upsell drop-off)
Digital vs physical fulfillment (shipping touch only if physical)
Engaged with bonus content vs not (trigger-link clicks)

sequence.beat: Reassure the buyer, fulfill FIRST (deliver the digital copy + promised bonus training), set the relationship tone.
sequence.subject_angle: "Your order is confirmed — here's your bonus access"
sequence.body_framework: Lead-Funnels rule: fulfill the promise BEFORE any ask. Deliver download/access links + the high-value bonus training that bridges to the backend. Warm welcome from the Attractive Character. If physical: shipping timeline + tracking-to-come.

sequence.step: Recover buyers who declined the OTO
sequence.beat: Re-present the one-time offer to the 'no-upsell' segment — the Cookbook drop-off leak (#: 'no-upsell -> Message #1/#2/#3').
sequence.delay: +1 to +24 hours (while purchase intent is hot), only to `oto-declined`
sequence.subject_angle: "Wait — you skipped this (one-time)" / "Your buyer-only upgrade is still open"
sequence.body_framework: Stealth / Columbo soft-close ('By the way, since you grabbed [book], you can still add [OTO]…') + Jim Edwards Problem/Agitate/Solve on the specific gap the OTO fills. Honest one-time framing — if the OTO truly closes, honor it. Single CTA to a one-click add.
sequence.branch: Accepts -> tag `oto-recovered`, stop this phase. Declines again -> proceed to ascension, do not keep pushing the OTO.

sequence.step: Bond the new buyer to the Attractive Character
sequence.beat: Turn a $7.95 buyer into a fan who opens every email. Build the relationship that makes ascension possible.
sequence.delay: Daily across the first 3-5 days post-purchase
sequence.body_framework: Soap Opera Sequence applied to buyers: (1) Set the Stage (what to expect now they're 'in'); (2) High Drama + Backstory; (3) Epiphany tied to the backend offer; (4) Hidden Benefits of going further. Each opens a loop to the next and seeds the next-step offer.
sequence.copy_notes: This is the bond-building Brunson says raises stick rate before the SECOND funnel is offered.

sequence.step: Bridge to the next funnel in the value ladder
sequence.beat: Move the bonded buyer UP — register them for the webinar or invite them to apply (the next funnel in the stack).
sequence.delay: After the bonding sequence (day 5-7+), then ongoing
sequence.body_framework: Soap Opera Email #5 (Urgency + CTA) handing off to the NEXT funnel: invite to the webinar (-> webinar template) or the application (-> application template). 3 Closes can run here if selling directly. After this, buyer drops into the ongoing Daily Seinfeld Sequence.
sequence.copy_notes: Stack the next funnel: book funnel -> webinar funnel -> high-ticket. Profit lives in the stack, not the front end.

copy_persona.primary: DotCom Secrets (Soap Opera Sequence buyer-bonding) + Copywriting Secrets (Stealth/Columbo OTO close).
scripts_used: Lead-Funnels 'fulfill before any ask' rule (deliver the book/bonus first)
Stealth / Columbo close (Copywriting Secrets) for the second-chance OTO ('By the way…')
Problem/Agitate/Solve (Copywriting Secrets) on the specific gap the OTO fills
Soap Opera Sequence (DotCom Secrets) for buyer bonding #1-#5
Daily Seinfeld Sequence (DotCom Secrets) as the ongoing buyer-list cadence after ascension hand-off
copy_persona.structural_persona: russell-brunson-the-funnel-hackers-cookbook + Marketing Secrets Blackbook — Book Funnel / Free-Plus-Shipping recipe (2-step order + bump -> OTO 1 -> OTO 2/downsell -> confirmation/bonus page with high-ticket CTA); Cart-Maximization (bump -> OTO -> downsell); Drop-Off Automation for the no-upsell leak; Funnel Stacking up the value ladder.

ghl_build.engine: Skill 44 (caf) builds the workflow; purchase + OTO disposition arrive as Order Submitted triggers / tags from the funnel.
ghl_build.workflow_name: FSF — Book/FPS Post-Purchase: Deliver -> OTO Recover -> Bond -> Ascend

trigger_config.ghl_trigger: Order Submitted = front-end product (or Tag Added `fe-purchased`)
trigger_config.oto_disposition: Funnel sets `oto-accepted` / `oto-declined` tags; if absent, infer from order line items
trigger_config.fulfillment_branch: If/Else physical vs digital -> include shipping touch only for physical

actions_in_order: 1. Send Email + SMS — Order confirmation + bonus/access delivery; tag `fe-purchased`
3. If/Else `oto-declined`? TRUE -> Wait 2 hr -> Send Email + SMS second-chance OTO (Stealth close) -> If accepts tag `oto-recovered` & skip repeat
4. Wait 1 day -> Send Email — Buyer Bonding #1 (Set the Stage)
8. Wait 1 day -> Ascension Email + SMS (invite to next funnel: webinar reg / application)
9. Add tag `ready-to-ascend`; hand off to next funnel's workflow + ongoing Daily Seinfeld list
10. Refund/cancel at any point -> route to retention/cancellation-save workflow
ghl_build.goal_event: Ascension purchase / next-funnel entry -> exit this sequence into the next funnel's follow-up.
ghl_build.notes: Honor the 'one-time' OTO claim — if the second-chance link stays open forever the urgency is fake (Edwards/Soap Opera rule). The ascension step is a HAND-OFF: it should enroll the buyer into the Webinar or Application follow-up template, not duplicate that logic here.

books: The Funnel Hacker's Cookbook (Free+Shipping / Book Funnel; Cart-Maximization bump->OTO->downsell; Drop-Off Automation no-upsell -> Message #1/#2/#3; Funnel Stacking)
Marketing Secrets Blackbook (Book Funnel free-plus-shipping; bonus-bridge to backend)
DotCom Secrets (Soap Opera + Daily Seinfeld; value ladder ascension)
Copywriting Secrets — Jim Edwards (Stealth/Columbo close, PAS, honest scarcity)
source.fidelity_note: Order = fulfill-first, no-upsell recovery, buyer bonding, stack-the-next-funnel — all taken directly from the Book/FPS recipe + Drop-Off Automation + Funnel Stacking. No invented mechanics.

flexibility.principle: This template is a recommended default and a resource — it is NEVER a rule or a requirement.
flexibility.mode_1_user_has_explicit_desire: Do exactly what the user wants. This template is an optional reference only; it is never imposed or overridden onto their choice.
flexibility.mode_2_user_is_unsure: Suggest this proven template and explain why it works, but let the user decide.
flexibility.mode_3_user_wants_it_handled: Build the whole automation from this template.
flexibility.note: Always overridable, mixable, customizable, or ignorable. It assists; it does not dominate.
